source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Dramatic product UI with confident display hierarchy, compact interface labels, tabular numerals, and Japanese typography guidance.
layout: Angled spear-petal composition, tropical leaf navigation, botanical rib texture, 8px radii, presentation-ready dashboard surfaces, and clear semantic token structure.

prompts.label: Transparent bird of paradise bloom motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Bird of Paradise transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a bird of paradise bloom motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete botanical cutout on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single Strelitzia bird of paradise bloom with dramatic orange sepals, vivid cobalt-blue arrow petals, green bracts, and a few spear-shaped tropical leaves. Botanical accuracy, crisp petal and leaf edges, sculptural flower form, rich natural texture, unmistakably bird of paradise flower.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full bloom, green bract, short stem, and spear leaves without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no bird, no feathers, no orchid, no banana flower, no vase, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Bird of Paradise light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Bird of Paradise", derived from the visible transparent bird of paradise bloom cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible dramatic presentation UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, target 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide. Clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Bird of Paradise, Bird of Paradise Bloom, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from orange spear-like sepals, cobalt-blue arrow petals, deep tropical green spear leaves, red-green bract gradients, botanical ribbing, and dramatic tropical garden contrast. The board must read as bird-of-paradise flower, not bird feathers, orchid, banana flower, or generic tropical UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Use crisp product-interface typography with compact presentation hierarchy. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing scale, 8px radius, border, shadow, texture samples, token chips, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, dramatic presentation system, white warm-petal background, orange primary actions, cobalt-blue accent commands, spear-leaf green secondary states, dark bract ink text, botanical rib texture, angled spear shapes, crisp 8px cards, refined shadows.
Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the flower and leaves; avoid unrelated purple gradients, beach imagery, rainbow palettes, beige-only palette, neon colors, and random brand names.
Text constraints: no watermark, no long paragraphs, no tiny unreadable token walls, no misspelling of "Morphous Bird of Paradise".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Bird of Paradise dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Bird of Paradise". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the bird of paradise bloom cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, target 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide. Clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Bird of Paradise, Bird of Paradise Bloom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve the light board system language: orange spear-sepal primary actions, cobalt-blue command/accent states, spear-leaf green navigation and success states, dark palm/bract ink surfaces, red-green bract gradients, botanical rib texture, angled spear shapes, crisp 8px cards, refined shadows. Must read as bird-of-paradise flower, not a bird, feathers, orchid, or generic tropical dashboard.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing scale, 8px radius, border, shadow, texture samples, token chips, simple icons.
Visual details: dark background derived from deepest palm leaf and bract colors, warm petal-neutral foreground, orange active states, cobalt-blue focus rings and command highlights, tropical green sidebars and success states, subtle leaf rib and petal fiber overlays, dramatic presentation UI with controlled contrast.
Color constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated purple gradients, no beach imagery, no rainbow palettes, no pure-black-only flat background, no unrelated saturated colors.
Text constraints: no watermark, no long paragraphs, no tiny unreadable token walls, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Bird of Paradise".
